steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "kPoint@123"
And user goes to Portal menu from Admin dropdown
And user changes to vega admin pages
And user goes to Groups menu
And clicks on Add Members Plus Icon
And user uploads ""C:\var\jenkins\workspace\web-automation-python@2\scripts\RemoveInvalidUserFromGroup.exe"" file to remove non-existing members from the group
Then user verifies failed error modal for non-existing user
